items.title: Questions raised over whether £3.8m government grant awarded to Wrexham AFC was lawful
items.summary: Exclusive: The club, owned by Hollywood stars Ryan Reynolds and Rob Mac, received the grant without a contract or final state aid assessment in place Wrexham AFC, the football club part-owned by Hollywood stars Ryan Reynolds and Rob Mac, was given a £3.8m government grant without a contract or a finished state aid assessment in place, raising questions over whether the award was lawful. The club has received £18m in taxpayer-funded grants – far more than any other in the UK – to help to redevelop its stadium, the Racecourse Ground (Y Cae Ras in Welsh). Continue reading...

items.title: 'Bournemouth vindt opvolger van Iraola in Duitsland'
items.summary: Marco Rose wordt de nieuwe manager van Bournemouth, zo meldt Sky Sports . De 49-jarige Duitser is de opvolger van Andoni Iraola, die onlangs aangaf zijn aflopende contract bij The Cherries niet te verlengen. Rose zat al ruim een jaar zonder club, nadat hij in maart 2025 werd ontslagen bij RB Leipzig.

items.title: Bournemouth set to appoint Marco Rose as manager for next season
items.summary: Talks held with German over replacing Andoni Iraola Rose out of work so can start planning immediately Bournemouth are set to appoint Marco Rose as their new manager after successful talks with the German. Rose has emerged as the favoured candidate to replace Andoni Iraola, who is stepping down when his contract expires this summer, and an agreement in principle is in place for him to take over. Tiago Pinto, Bournemouth’s head of football operations, has moved swiftly since learning that Iraola has decided to seek a fresh challenge. Bournemouth considered a move for Kieran McKenna but the Ipswich Town manager’s heavy buyout clause presented a significant challenge and made a move for Rose more likely. Rose has been out of work since leaving RB Leipzig in March 2025, making a deal with the 49-year-old easier to complete, and he will be able to start planning for next season now. Continue reading...

items.title: Promotiekoorts: de weg van Schalke 04 naar terugkeer in Bundesliga
items.summary: Schalke 04 ligt op koers om in het vijfde seizoen op het tweede niveau van Duitsland eindelijk weer terug te keren naar de Bundesliga. De club uit Gelsenkirchen is nog vijf duels verwijderd van de heilige graal. De weg naar promotie geschetst.

items.title: From Cantona to Sané: five games that determined the destiny of the title
items.summary: The Premier League has history when it comes to clashes between the two teams fighting to become champions Kevin Keegan’s swashbuckling Newcastle looked set to be runaway champions, but from 12 points clear they were slowly reeled in by Alex Ferguson’s ruthless Manchester United. When the two title-chasers met at St James’ Park in early March, Keegan’s previously irresistible attack was kept out repeatedly by Peter Schmeichel, and there was a sense of inevitability when Eric Cantona popped up to volley home the winner at the far post. Ferguson’s side travelled home a point behind Newcastle, who had been dragged into a scrap, and when he turned up the mind games in the run-in, Keegan boiled over on live TV in unforgettable fashion. How the Magpies manager would have loved it if his champions-elect had put their challengers away when they had the chance. Continue reading...

items.title: Na nieuwe triomf voor Club Brugge: Jonas De Roeck stuurt meteen gewaagde boodschap de wereld in

items.title: De 43e minuut dit weekend voor krijger met hartstilstand? Boodschap om te verspreiden over het hele land
items.summary: In de provincie Luik zal de 43e minuut van elke wedstrijd gespeeld worden voor Ali Hamdi, die in het ziekenhuis vecht voor zijn leven nadat hij afgelopen zondag tijdens een wedstrijd een hartstilstand kreeg. Een golf van steun die mogelijk verder reikt dan de grenzen van de Luikse regio?
